title: Use-After-Free, Double Free, and Stale Aliases · Object-Lifetime Lens: Quarantine Generation Defense
summary: An asynchronous job queue keeps aliases after cancellation and occasionally corrupts a newly allocated job at the same address. Planned artifact: Add and verify the cmem quarantine generation defense increment in generation-checked handle repair. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use generation counters, handles, quarantine, or delayed reclamation where stale asynchronous references cannot be excluded.
Use nulling as a local state aid without claiming it repairs aliases, temporal races, or ownership ambiguity.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
